name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-1
title: E2E TDD enforcement: tests must cover full feature stack
description: When a feature includes multiple layers (UI, backend, data), tests must exercise the full chain — from the user-facing entry point through to the final state change. R3 currently requires automated non-interactive tests but does not explicitly mandate full-stack coverage. This item tracks adding an explicit full-stack E2E requirement to workflow-rules R3.

history.note: workflow-rules.md R3 updated with explicit full E2E chain mandate; test-backlog001-r3-e2e.sh added; policy feature test-green
